meta.methodology: Based on seasonal color analysis (warm/cool/neutral undertones) combined with contrast level theory

primary.name: Navy
primary.reason: Creates elegant contrast without being harsh

primary.name: Emerald
primary.reason: Complements cool undertones beautifully

primary.name: Burgundy
primary.reason: Adds warmth while respecting cool undertone

primary.name: Soft Pink
primary.reason: Harmonizes with natural skin warmth

primary.name: Lavender
primary.reason: Cool-toned complement that brightens complexion

primary.name: Charcoal
primary.reason: Softer than black, flattering contrast

avoid.name: Orange
avoid.reason: Clashes with cool undertones, can look sallow

avoid.name: Mustard
avoid.reason: Too warm, washes out fair cool skin

avoid.name: Beige
avoid.reason: Can make skin look flat and blended

primary.name: Dusty Rose
primary.reason: Perfect neutral complement

primary.name: Sage Green
primary.reason: Earthy and flattering for neutral undertones

primary.name: Camel
primary.reason: Tonal dressing that looks intentional

primary.name: Cobalt Blue
primary.reason: Vibrant enough to add life without clashing

primary.name: Plum
primary.reason: Rich depth that flatters neutral skin

primary.name: Terracotta
primary.reason: Warm earth tone that creates glow

accent.name: Ivory
accent.reason: Cleaner than pure white, more flattering

accent.name: Rose Gold
accent.reason: Metallic that bridges warm and cool

accent.name: Teal
accent.reason: Versatile depth that works with neutral undertones

avoid.name: Pure White
avoid.reason: Can look stark against light neutral skin

avoid.name: Hot Pink
avoid.reason: Can appear garish against neutral tones

primary.name: Olive Green
primary.reason: Warm green that makes golden undertones sing

primary.name: Burnt Orange
primary.reason: Enhances warm undertones naturally

primary.name: Gold
primary.reason: Mirrors natural warmth in skin

primary.name: Rich Teal
primary.reason: Contrast that complements warm tones

primary.name: Warm Red
primary.reason: Vibrant but grounded by warm undertone

primary.name: Chocolate
primary.reason: Rich depth that harmonizes perfectly

accent.name: Copper
accent.reason: Warm metallic that glows on medium skin

accent.name: Warm White
accent.reason: Softer than pure white, more harmonious

avoid.name: Pastel Pink
avoid.reason: Too cool and washed out for warm undertones

avoid.name: Icy Blue
avoid.reason: Cool tone fights with warm undertone

primary.name: Rust
primary.reason: Earth tone that brings out olive glow

primary.name: Forest Green
primary.reason: Enhances the natural green in olive skin

primary.name: Deep Purple
primary.reason: Rich contrast that flatters warm-green undertones

primary.name: Warm Coral
primary.reason: Adds brightness without clashing

primary.name: Bronze
primary.reason: Metallic warmth that mirrors skin's golden-green

primary.name: Amber
primary.reason: Warm and luminous complement

accent.name: Off-White
accent.reason: Cleaner look than pure white on olive skin

accent.name: Warm Gold
accent.reason: Picks up golden tones in skin

avoid.name: Lilac
avoid.reason: Cool pastel clashes with warm-green base

avoid.name: Baby Blue
avoid.reason: Cool and desaturating on olive skin

primary.name: Bright Coral
primary.reason: Pops beautifully against tan skin

primary.name: Turquoise
primary.reason: Electric contrast that photographs amazingly

primary.name: Saffron
primary.reason: Warm and regal — looks intentionally luxe

primary.name: Hot Pink
primary.reason: Bold enough to create stunning contrast

primary.name: Electric Blue
primary.reason: Vibrant cool tone that creates energy

primary.name: Lime Green
primary.reason: Fresh and modern against warm skin

accent.name: Cream
accent.reason: Elegant light neutral that glows on tan skin

avoid.name: Khaki
avoid.reason: Too close to skin tone, looks muddy

avoid.name: Olive Drab
avoid.reason: Muted and too close in value

avoid.name: Maroon
avoid.reason: Can look overly dark and heavy

primary.name: Bright White
primary.reason: Maximum contrast — clean and striking

primary.name: Cobalt
primary.reason: Rich jewel tone that commands attention

primary.name: Fuchsia
primary.reason: Bold and beautiful against deep skin

primary.name: Emerald
primary.reason: Jewel green that creates regal energy

primary.name: Bright Yellow
primary.reason: Showstopping contrast that glows

primary.name: Royal Purple
primary.reason: Cool-toned depth that elevates everything

accent.name: Silver
accent.reason: Cool metallic that complements cool undertone

avoid.name: Dark Brown
avoid.reason: Too close to skin tone, disappears

avoid.name: Muted Olive
avoid.reason: Desaturating and dull against rich skin
